user.title: Set up Whereabouts
user.description: Select the people to track, how long to wait between geocode calls, and the radius used to detect calendar event venues.

calendars.title: Assign calendar — {person_name}
calendars.description: Optionally link a calendar to {person_name}. When a calendar event with a location is active and {person_name} is within the arrival radius, their sensor will show the event name instead of the city.

error.no_persons_selected: Please select at least one person to track.
error.scan_interval_too_low: Interval must be at least 1 minute.

abort.already_configured: This combination of people is already being tracked.

trigger_type.calendar_arrived: Arrived at a calendar event venue

settings.title: Whereabouts settings
settings.description: Update tracked people, geocode cooldown, and event arrival radius.

calendars.title: Assign calendar — {person_name}
calendars.description: Optionally link a calendar to {person_name}. When a calendar event with a location is active and {person_name} is within the arrival radius, their sensor will show the event name instead of the city.

error.scan_interval_too_low: Interval must be at least 1 minute.
